name: cdxi-project-portal
description: CDXI Project Portal - Monorepo with React frontend and Python backend

scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && python -m venv venv && source venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt && python server.py
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.build:backend: echo 'Backend is a Python app - no build needed'
scripts.test: npm run test:frontend && npm run test:backend
